name: Simply the Best Blue Cheese Dressing
directions: Mix all ingredients together, except blue cheese.
Add blue cheese and mix to distribute evenly.
(Mixture will be very thick).
If you like, add a little more buttermilk.
Pour into large container and store in refrigerator.
It will keep indefinitely.

similar.name: Blue Cheese Dressing Better Than from the Store
Simple Blue Cheese Dressing (With Less Mayo)
The Best Blue Cheese Salad Dressing Ever

name: Old South Blue Cheese Dressing or Dip
directions: In food processor, grind onions.
Remove; then grind olives.
Return onions to processor and add mayo and buttermilk. Pulse until well blended.
Add blue cheese crumbles; stir.
Pour into jar.
Cover and refrigerate at least one hour to blend flavors before serving.

similar.name: Blue Cheese Dressing Better Than from the Store
Simple Blue Cheese Dressing (With Less Mayo)

name: Blue Cheese Dressing- Low Fat
directions: Combine first six ingredients in food processor.
Add milk to desired thinness.
Blend till smooth.

similar.name: Simple Blue Cheese Dressing (With Less Mayo)
Blue Cheese Dressing Better Than from the Store

name: Blue Cheese Dressing
directions: Combine all ingredients in a bowl and stir well.
Cover and refrigerate overnight.
Serve with an Iceberg Lettuce wedge and top with purple onions and crisp bacon.

similar.name: Blue Cheese Dressing Better Than from the Store

name: The Best Blue Cheese Salad Dressing Ever
directions: Blend lemon juice into milk [or use buttermilk if you have that on hand].
Mix mayo and sour cream and then add milk.
Add finely minced garlic to taste [you can also leave this out].
Add a splash of Worcestershire, or more to taste.
Add all the cheese you want, to taste [i always heaped in a lot of the best imported cheese i could find].
Refrigerate.
This will keep in the refrigerator for a month, but it probably won't last that long.

similar.name: Simple Blue Cheese Dressing (With Less Mayo)
Blue Cheese Dressing Better Than from the Store

name: Rosy Blue Cheese Dressing (Lighter Version)
directions: In covered jar, combine all ingredients.
Shake until well blended.
Cover and refrigerate until serving, at least 2 hours.
Shake again before using.

similar.name: Blue Cheese Dressing Better Than from the Store

name: Low Fat Blue Cheese Dressing
directions: Drain yogurt through a coffee filter paper for 1/2 hour, so that some of the liquid drains out.
In a bowl, whisk the buttermilk and thickened yogurt with the mayonnaise until smooth.
Add the vinegar and Splenda and mix until all the ingredients are well combined.
Stir in the blue cheese and season to taste, with salt and pepper.
Let it sit in the fridge for 30 minutes before using.

similar.name: Blue Cheese Dressing Better Than from the Store

name: Blue Cheese Dressing
directions: Get out a medium sized bowl.  Measure the mayonnaise into the bowl.  Gradually whisk in the evaporated milk.  Add the sugar, garlic powder and celery salt. Mix well.  Crumble up the blue cheese and stir it in too.  Transfer the dressing to a pint sized canning jar.  Store in the fridge.  Makes about 1 2/3 cups of dressing.  Very tasty.

similar.name: Blue Cheese Dressing Better Than from the Store

name: Bleu Cheese Dressing
directions: Combine all ingredients except the bleu cheese; mix well.
Crumble bleu cheese, add to mixture and stir.

similar.name: Blue Cheese Dressing Better Than from the Store

name: Yogurt Blue Cheese Salad Dressing
directions: Combine yogurt, mayonnaise and lemon juice in a small bowl.
Add blue cheese, garlic and chives.
Season to taste with salt and pepper. (personally I like a lot of pepper and a little salt!).

name: Clubhouse Salad Dressing (Blue Cheese)
directions: Mix all ingredients, except for the blue cheese and oil, in a blender until smooth.
With blender on high, slowly add oil.
Dressing should be very thick.
Add cheese and mix gently, leaving chunks.
Toss with romaine and crutons.

similar.name: Blue Cheese Dressing Better Than from the Store
The Best Blue Cheese Salad Dressing Ever

name: Blue Cheese Dressing
directions: In small bowl, combine all ingredients until blended.
Cover and refrigerate until serving.
Enjoy!

name: Blue Cheese Dressing
directions: Combine all the ingredients in bowl.
Using a whisk, blend ingredients together - do not use a food processor as this will rob you of that wonderful chunky blue cheese texture.
Refrigerate at least one hour before serving.

Note: I recommend using Gorgonzola which is a reasonably priced, easily obtainable ivory colored Italian cheese with blue-green veins, made from whole cow's milk. I buy the 7 ounce wedges which have a buttery texture and crumble it into the mixture by hand (messy but good).

similar.name: Blue Cheese Dressing Better Than from the Store

name: Blue Cheese Dressing
directions: Use a fork and stir everything together except the blue cheese.
When thoroughly mixed, fold in the blue cheese.

name: Blue Cheese Dressing Better Than from the Store
directions: Add all ingredients to food processor and blend.
If you prefer a chunky blue cheese dressing reserve 1/4 cup of the blue cheese and stir in by hand.
Store in the refrigerator for up to one week.
Flavors mingle so make at least one hour prior to serving.

name: Blue Cheese Salad Dressing
directions: Combine mayonnaise, Worcestershire sauce, lemon juice and Alouette Cuisine Creme Fraiche in a bowl and whisk well .
Add Alouette Crumbled Blue Cheese and mix well.
Serve immediately on your favorite salad greens or keep refrigerated for up to 3 days.

similar.name: Blue Cheese Dressing Better Than from the Store
The Best Blue Cheese Salad Dressing Ever

name: Simple Blue Cheese Dressing (With Less Mayo)
directions: In a small food processor, combine all ingredients; cover and process until blended.
Transfer to a small bowl and cover and refrigerate until serving. (The longer it sits, the better the flavors will blend).
